title: Collect, prepare and preserve plant specimens
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect, prepare and preserve plant specimens demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect plant specimens

pcs.text: Collect plant specimen according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect plant specimen according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect plant specimen according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure the sample includes sufficient plant parts required for positive identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure the sample includes sufficient plant parts required for positive identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure the sample includes sufficient plant parts required for positive identification.

pcs.text: Observe plant characteristics and record observations according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe plant characteristics and record observations according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe plant characteristics and record observations according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure congruence of specimens and observations by accurate labelling according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure congruence of specimens and observations by accurate labelling according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure congruence of specimens and observations by accurate labelling according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Collect plant specimens

elements.title: Preserve plant specimens

pcs.text: Store collected plant specimens to prevent degradation until they can be preserved according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store collected plant specimens to prevent degradation until they can be preserved according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store collected plant specimens to prevent degradation until they can be preserved according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and select an appropriate preservation technique according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select an appropriate preservation technique according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select an appropriate preservation technique according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare and arrange specimens for preserving according to preservation technique and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and arrange specimens for preserving according to preservation technique and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and arrange specimens for preserving according to preservation technique and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Preserve the specimen according to selected preservation technique
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Preserve the specimen according to selected preservation technique?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Preserve the specimen according to selected preservation technique.

pcs.text: Arrange and mount the preserved specimen and observation records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange and mount the preserved specimen and observation records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange and mount the preserved specimen and observation records according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Package the specimens and submit for identification according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Package the specimens and submit for identification according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Package the specimens and submit for identification according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Preserve plant specimens

elements.title: Record and catalogue specimen

pcs.text: Record and catalogue specimen information according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and catalogue specimen information according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and catalogue specimen information according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: File records appropriately according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can File records appropriately according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can File records appropriately according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Record and catalogue specimen

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
